hero.title: Amansan akwantuo ho nhyehye…õ
hero.lead: Saa nhyehye…õ yi kyer…õ amansan nnwuma a w…îhw…õ so w…î IATF no mu. Adwuma a w…îagye ato mu, bea…õ ho nhyehy…õe…õ, ne mfoni a w…îakora so w…î h…î no nyinaa da adi w…î ha.

header.title: Nkrataa ahodo…î a etwa s…õ y…õhyehy…õ w…î kasa no mu

intro: W…îahyehy…õ nhyehye…õ a w…îagye ato mu w…î ha bere a w…îatintim no.

header.title: SŒµdeŒµ yŒµn nsa bŒµka nkyerŒµkyerŒµ mu ahiadeŒµ bi ho a yŒµbŒµdan no …îmanfo dwumadeŒµ

paragraphs: IATF y…õ nhwehw‘ëmu a ‘ëkyer‘ë ahiade‘ë a emu y‘ë den a ‘ëb‘ëtumi asesa ab‘ëy‘ë adwuma a mfaso w‘ën so.

emptyState.title: Nhyehy…õe…õ a w…îatintim no da so w…î h…î
paragraphs: IATF rehyehy…õ n'adwuma a edi kan w…î …îman no mu.
Wob…õtumi ato nsa afr…õ y…õn bere a wohia mmoa p…îtee bi.
